## Performance optimization {#performance}

Optimizing application performance involves multiple strategies at different layers.

### Caching {#caching}

Caching stores frequently accessed data closer to the consumer.

#### Browser caching {#browser-caching}

Browser caching uses HTTP headers to control how long resources are stored locally.

#### Server-side caching {#server-caching}

Server-side caching keeps computed results in memory to avoid repeated work.

### Lazy loading {#lazy-loading}

Lazy loading defers the loading of resources until they are actually needed.
